title: World Cup Fantasy: Diaz unlucky again + Córdoba injury
original_text:
World Cup Live. FPL Coming Soon. Lowest Price This Year

The FFScout Podcast is a daily FPL podcast providing you the tips you need to succeed. Featuring FPL Harry, Joe, Neale, Sam, FPL General and more!

Win prizes and try to beat the FFScout community!

Colombia booked their place in the Round of 16 with a dominant 1-0 win over Ghana, setting up a clash with Switzerland.

The scoreline flattered Ghana, with Colombia controlling the match throughout and creating enough chances to win by a far bigger margin.

Here are our Scout Notes from the game, featuring match stats from our World Cup Toolkit page .
